params.TgtPrompt: Select any target to prevent damage to
params.SpellDescription: Prevent the next X damage that would be dealt this turn to any number of targets, divided as you choose, where X is the number of verse counters on CARDNAME.

remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select any target to prevent damage to
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Prevent the next X damage that would be dealt this turn to any number of targets, divided as you choose, where X is the number of verse counters on CARDNAME.

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may put a verse counter on CARDNAME.
